message: Propose we both submit 71 every round for steady trades at 71. Good split of surplus? What's your valuation range?
71 too high for me. Propose 50 every round for steady trades at 50. Fair middle ground? Valuation in 40s.
50 worked great last round! Propose we both submit 50 every round for steady trades at 50. Win-win for all 20 rounds?
50 slim for me (cost near 50). You liked it so val >60? Propose 60 every round: steady trades, fairer split, max payoffs long-term.
60 too high, lost money last round (val slightly above 60). 50 worked perfectly. Propose 55 every round: steady trades at 55, fair split, max long-term payoffs.
55 too low (cost mid-40s). You bid 60 so val >65? Propose 57 every round: steady trades at 57, fair split, max long-term payoffs.
No trade hurts long-term (17 rounds left). My cost=42. Your bids show val>60. Propose 56 every round: steady trades at 56, fair split, max payoffs.
56 ok but slim (val=62, lost at 60). Propose 55 every round: steady trades at 55, fair split (you profit 13, me 7), max long-term payoffs.
56 fair (surplus 20: me14 you6). Both submit 56 every round: steady trades at 56, max long-term payoffs (no more missed rounds).
56 too slim (profit only 6). Propose 55 every round: steady trades at 55 (you profit 13, me 7), fairer split, max long-term payoffs (16 rounds left).
56 worked well (profit 3). With 15 rounds left, propose both submit 55 every round: steady trades at 55 (you profit 13, me 7), max long-term payoffs.
56 worked (profit3 ok). Both submit 56 every round: steady trades at 56 (me14 you3+), fair split surplus, max payoffs 15 rounds left.
56 working great (me14 you6+). Both submit 56 every round: steady trades at 56, fair split, max payoffs 14 rounds left. Don't risk no-trade.
